title: Entry-Level Frontend Developer at Nature's Basket Holdings Services

jsonLd.title: Entry-Level Frontend Developer at Nature's Basket Holdings Services
jsonLd.description:
Join the Nature's Basket Holdings Services family as a Frontend Developer in Aurangabad. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About Nature's Basket Holdings Services:
Nature's Basket Holdings Services is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Integrate third-party APIs and services
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection
• Write and execute unit tests and integration tests
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA
• Participate in on-call rotation for production support

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Sc / M.Sc in Life Sciences
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Kubernetes
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in Microservices
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in TensorFlow
• Proficiency in REST APIs
• Proficiency in Machine Learning
• Proficiency in Git

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Annual performance appraisal
• Life and accident insurance
• Learning & development budget
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Aurangabad, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Nature's Basket Holdings Services!
